message:
chore(release): update GoReleaser config for v2 compatibility

Migrate deprecated GoReleaser v1 configuration to v2 format:

Archive format changes:
- Replace `format: tar.gz` with `formats: [tar.gz]` (plural array)
- Replace `format_overrides[].format` with `formats` array syntax
- Update binary archive to use `formats: [binary]`

Homebrew migration:
- Replace deprecated `brews` section with `homebrew_casks`
- Change directory from `Formula` to `Casks`
- Update `install:` block to `binaries:` list
- Convert `dependencies` to new object syntax with `formula:` key
- Add explicit `completions:` configuration for shell completions
- Remove `license` and `test` fields (not supported in casks)

These changes eliminate all deprecation warnings from `goreleaser check`
and ensure compatibility with GoReleaser v2.10+.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,7 +57,8 @@ universal_binaries:
 
 archives:
   - id: default
-    format: tar.gz
+    formats:
+      - tar.gz
     name_template: >-
       {{ .ProjectName }}_
       {{- .Version }}_
@@ -70,11 +71,13 @@ archives:
       - CHANGELOG*
     format_overrides:
       - goos: windows
-        format: zip
+        formats:
+          - zip
 
   # Also create raw binaries for curl-based install
   - id: binary
-    format: binary
+    formats:
+      - binary
     name_template: >-
       {{ .ProjectName }}_
       {{- .Os }}_
@@ -158,27 +161,25 @@ release:
 
     **Container Image**: `ghcr.io/dicklesworthstone/ntm:{{ .Tag }}`
 
-brews:
+homebrew_casks:
   - name: ntm
     ids:
       - default  # Use only the tarball archives, not the binary archives
     repository:
       owner: Dicklesworthstone
       name: homebrew-tap
       token: "{{ .Env.HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}"
-    directory: Formula
+    directory: Casks
     homepage: "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm"
     description: "Named Tmux Manager - Orchestrate AI coding agents in tmux sessions"
-    license: "MIT"
+    binaries:
+      - ntm
     dependencies:
-      - name: tmux
-    install: |
-      bin.install "ntm"
-
-      # Generate shell completions
-      generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"ntm", "completion")
-    test: |
-      system "#{bin}/ntm", "version"
+      - formula: tmux
+    completions:
+      bash: ntm completion bash
+      zsh: ntm completion zsh
+      fish: ntm completion fish
     caveats: |
       To enable shell integration, add to your shell rc file:
